title: Falings' Summonings
description: Adds a new ender mob with trades to spare, a new currency and a new magic structure
body:
# What is it?
The order of the eye lives once more. A long-lost race of traders from another plane have made their answer to extinction: by interjecting Ender magic into villagers, they are able to create a gateway to the Overworld to find a new life and spread their trades to all.

# Features

## Faling
![The Faling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08247197d2e52396701d915c8236bb1ad500b788.png)
This is the Faling. It's summoned by throwing an eye of ender at a villager, and harnessing their ancient ender magic, a faling will take its place.

### Trading with falings
![The falings' trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce7c63a674f4fbd1c6a02cf2b0eea542381db02.png)

Falings have collected a specific collection of rare items that they intend to trade off to players, seeing as these are some of the rarest items out there.

## Endmeralds
The falings trade for a rare material dubbed endmerald, due to them looking similar to emeralds.
> 
![An endmerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fb02e35dd9f5b1a7a59e3cf2b8dcf3bd56cb5e7.png)

Endmeralds can be obtained by mining endstone with a pickaxe and hoping luck is on your side. The Fortune enchantment on the pickaxe increases the amounts of endmeralds dropped.
![Me mining endstone for endmeralds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c782ba02b32e2aa380b5ede4a354fdfad7b3816_0.webp)

## The End Combine
![The end combine in item form and in built form](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a299d4210213a967e8cc7073ee0df4ea213659fe_0.webp)

The faling race's newest genius: the End Combine, a machination that utilizes mysterious hammerspace tech to build itself when placed. Upon so, it provides the Slow Falling effect to all players nearby, useful for places with a lot of vertical travel.

## Advancements
- Faling From the Deep: Summon a Faling by throwing an Eye of Ender at a Villager
- World Trade: Trade with a Faling using Endmeralds
- Acquire Floatware: Buy and End Combine from a Faling
- Combined Power: Place an End Combine



# Installation Guide:
## Data Pack version:
- Make sure your Minecraft version matches the data pack version
- Download the data pack
- Download the resource pack provided with the data pack by clicking on the data pack at the downloads page
- Exit the world you want to install the data pack in
- Select that world in the world selection screen, click on "Edit", then "Open world folder".
- Open the folder named "datapacks", and put the downloaded 'faling[version you downloaded]-data.zip' file into it.
- Go back to the main ".minecraft" folder and enter the "resourcepacks" folder
- Place the "faling[version you downloaded]-resources.zip" file provided with the data pack file into this folder
- Now enter the world, and have fun :)

## Mod version:
- Make sure your Minecraft version matches the mod version
- Download the mod
- Go to your main ".minecraft" folder
- Enter the "mods" folder (or if you don't have one yet create one)
- Place the downloaded mod into the mods folder
- Now enter the world, and have fun :)

## Using the Modrinth App on desktop:
- Install the mod/data pack
- That's it, have fun :)
